economic_notes: First Nation has investments in forestry, environmental services, property management, and real estate partnerships. Jointly constructing SAY Lands building with Aitchelitz and Yakweakwioose First Nations. Member of Stó:lo Nation.
notes: Fiscal year is 2022, not 2024. SAY Lands building (cost $12,527,812) under construction jointly with Aitchelitz and Yakweakwioose First Nations; anticipated to be transferred post year-end to a newly formed cooperative along with $8,445,453 accumulated surplus — potential significant one-time transfer. 8 entities accounted for on modified equity basis (GBEs). 1 consolidated subsidiary (Skowkale Taxation Centre). Restricted cash includes security deposit ($25,000), prepaid rents ($32,188), and TCA reserve ($5,541,037). Term deposits of $5,000,000 included in cash flow statement. Prior year included one-time items: CFB Lands claim settlement ($572,022), SAY Lands ($500,000), Province of BC ($696,000). Total government transfers calculated as ISC + CMHC + Property taxes + FNHА + MoTI + FNESC + MCFD + Sto:lo Service Agency + School District #33 + Gaming revenue (provincial). No remuneration schedule included in the document.
